LEGISLATIVE ADDRESS:
STATE CAPITOL
P.O. BOX 942849
SACRAMENTO, CA 94249-0001
PHONE (916) 445-7587

DISTRICT OFFICE:
110 NORTH MAPLE ST
LOS ANGELES, CA 90042
PHONE (213) 255-7111

Assembly
California Legislature

RICHARD POLANCO
ASSEMBLYMEMBER, FIFTY-FIFTH DISTRICT

COMMITTEES:
BANKING, FINANCE &
BONDED INDEBTEDNESS
GOVERNMENTAL ORGANIZATION
HEALTH
RULES
UTILITIES AND COMMERCE
WAYS AND MEANS
CHAIR:
SUBCOMMITTEE ON INTERNATIONAL
TRADE AND BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT
SELECT COMMITTEE ON
CALIFORNIA-MEXICO AFFAIRS
SELECT COMMITTEE ON
STATE PUBLIC PROCUREMENT
PRACTICES

July 31, 1992

Mr. John Wallace, Counsel
Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Mr. Wallace:

I write to confirm your interpretation that the members of the
Latino Legislative Caucus can accept a gift in excess of $250.00
from the Mexican Government.

Should you have any questions or require further information,
please call my consultant Marco Firebaugh, at (213) 255-7111.

Sincerely,

RICHARD G. POLANCO
Assemblyman, 55th District

RP:mv

SERVING AT WATER VILLAGE, BOYLE HEIGHTS, CITY TERRACE, CYPRESS PARK, EAGLE ROCK, EAST LOS ANGELES, ECHOPARK, EL SERENO, ELYSIAN VALLEY,
GLASSELL PARK, HERMON, HIGHLAND PARK, LINCOLN HEIGHTS, MONTEBELLO HEIGHTS, MONTEREY HILLS, MT. WASHINGTON, PASADENA, SILVER LAKE

Printed on Recycled Paper
